records.question: Which employees named George Chuter started working in 2009 at the Valkeakoski shop managed by Olli Huttunen?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
JOIN shop ON hiring.shop_id = shop.shop_id
WHERE employee.name = 'George Chuter' AND hiring.start_from = '2009' AND shop.manager_name = 'Olli Huttunen' AND shop.location = 'Valkeakoski'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.Employee_ID
FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.Employee_ID = hiring.Employee_ID
JOIN shop ON hiring.Shop_ID = shop.Shop_ID
WHERE employee.Name = 'George Chuter'
  AND hiring.Start_from LIKE '2009%'
  AND shop.Name = 'Valkeakoski'
  AND shop.Manager_name = 'Olli Huttunen'
